name: genealogy-agent
description: Extracts family history from raw text, builds a local knowledge graph, generates Mermaid trees, and exports to Obsidian format.
author: flobo3

tools.name: extract_family_data
tools.description: Extracts structured family data (people, dates, relationships) from raw text using an LLM.

tools.name: build_family_graph
tools.description: Saves extracted family data into a local JSONL ontology graph.

input_file.description: Path to the JSON file with extracted data

output_file.description: Path to save the JSONL graph (default: family_graph.jsonl)

tools.name: generate_mermaid_tree
tools.description: Generates a Mermaid diagram from extracted family data.

input_file.description: Path to the JSON file with extracted data

output_file.description: Path to save the Mermaid diagram (default: family_tree.md)

tools.name: generate_obsidian_vault
tools.description: Generates an Obsidian-formatted vault (Markdown files with YAML frontmatter) from extracted family data.

input_file.description: Path to the JSON file with extracted data

output_dir.description: Directory to save the Obsidian markdown files

tools.name: research_ancestor
tools.description: Autonomously researches an ancestor using web search (DuckDuckGo) and LLM extraction to find new facts (death dates, military service, obituaries).

input_file.description: Path to the JSON file with extracted data

person_id.description: ID of the person to research (e.g., 'ivan_ivanov')

tools.name: export_gedcom
tools.description: Exports extracted family data to a standard GEDCOM (.ged) file for use in MyHeritage, FamilySearch, etc.

input_file.description: Path to the JSON file with extracted data

output_file.description: Path to save the GEDCOM file (default: family_tree.ged)
